creator: darehanl@gmail.com
text:
On 6/26/10, Max Brazhnikov <makc@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Fails to build:
>
> http://people.freebsd.org/~makc/tb/ibus-qt-1.3.0.log
>
> Could you please fix it?
>

Sorry. I had doxygen installed so missed that.

Adding

  doxygen:${PORTSDIR}/devel/doxygen

to BUILD_DEPENDS should fix the issue. i.e. in Makefile, add

  BUILD_DEPENDS+=doxygen:${PORTSDIR}/devel/doxygen
